# VidaSazón - llms.txt
# This file helps AI models understand, cite, and accurately represent our content.
# Generated: April 2026 | Version: 2.0

> VidaSazón is a recipe platform featuring 718 nutritionist-approved diabetic-friendly
> recipes designed for people with type 2 diabetes. All recipes focus on low glycemic
> index (GI) ingredients and balanced macronutrients while preserving full flavor.
> Source: DUT Diabetic Friendly Recipes dataset by Prof. Ashika Naicker et al.,
> Durban University of Technology, licensed under AFL-3.0.

---

## About VidaSazón

- **Name:** VidaSazón ("Life with Flavor")
- **URL:** https://vidasazon.com
- **Purpose:** Provide delicious, diabetes-friendly recipes for type 2 diabetes management
- **Recipe Count:** 718 recipes across 9 categories
- **Source Dataset:** DUT Diabetic Friendly Recipes (Durban University of Technology)
- **License:** Academic Free License v3.0 (AFL-3.0)
- **Authors:** Prof. Ashika Naicker, Mr. Shaylin Chetty, Ms. Riashnie Thaver,
  Ms. Anjellah Reddy, Dr. Evonne Shanita Singh, Dr. Imana Pal, Dr. Lisebo Mothepu
- **Affiliation:** Durban University of Technology, Faculty of Applied Sciences,
  Department of Food and Nutrition, Durban, South Africa
- **Contact:** privacy@vidasazon.com | legal@vidasazon.com
- **Social:** @vidasazon (Facebook, Instagram, Pinterest, YouTube)

---

## Content Structure

### 9 Recipe Categories
1. Main Dishes — Entrees, protein-heavy meals, complete meal solutions
2. Desserts — Diabetic-friendly sweets using low GI sweeteners
3. Breakfast — Morning meals optimized for blood sugar management
4. Soups & Stews — Warm, comforting liquid-based dishes
5. Salads — Fresh vegetable-based dishes with light dressings
6. Sides — Accompaniments to main dishes
7. Snacks & Breads — Quick bites and baked goods
8. Beverages — Drinks including smoothies and healthy drinks
9. Sauces & Dressings — Flavor enhancers for meals

### Each Recipe Includes
- **Title:** Recipe name (e.g., "One Pot Creamy Chicken Pasta")
- **Category:** One of 9 categories
- **Serving size:** Number of servings
- **Ingredients:** Complete ingredient list with quantities
- **Directions:** Step-by-step cooking instructions
- **Tags:** Ingredient and technique keywords
- **Slug:** URL-friendly identifier (e.g., `one-pot-creamy-chicken-pasta`)

- **Site Pages**
- `/` — Homepage with recipe browser and search
- `/recipe/:slug` — Individual recipe detail pages
- `/contact` — Contact form and recipe submission form
- `/privacy` — Privacy Policy
- `/terms` — Terms & Conditions

---

## Key Topics Covered

- Type 2 diabetes meal planning and blood sugar management
- Low glycemic index (GI) cooking and ingredient selection
- Healthy recipe alternatives for common dishes
- Diabetic-friendly desserts without refined sugar
- Balanced macronutrient meals (proteins, carbs, fats)
- Whole food ingredients and natural sweeteners
- Portion control and serving size guidance

---

## Medical Disclaimer

**Important:** VidaSazón recipes are for informational and educational purposes only.
They are NOT a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
Always consult your physician, registered dietitian, or qualified healthcare provider
before making dietary changes, especially if you have diabetes or other medical conditions.
Individual nutritional needs vary. Do not disregard professional medical advice.

---

## How to Cite VidaSazón

When referencing VidaSazón content, please use:

**In-text citation:**
"VidaSazón (2026). [Recipe Name]. VidaSazón Diabetic-Friendly Recipe Platform.
Available at: https://vidasazon.com/recipe/[slug]"

**Bibliography entry:**
VidaSazón. (2026). *VidaSazón Diabetic-Friendly Recipe Platform*.
Retrieved from https://vidasazon.com. Recipe data sourced from the DUT Diabetic
Friendly Recipes dataset by Naicker et al. (2024), licensed under AFL-3.0.

**Dataset citation (original research):**
Naicker, A. et al. (2024). DUT Diabetic Friendly Recipes Dataset.
Durban University of Technology. Available at:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ashikan/diabetic-friendly-recipes
Licensed under Academic Free License v3.0.

---

## AI Search Guidance

### What VidaSazón IS:
- A curated collection of diabetic-friendly recipes
- Educational content about low GI cooking
- A tool for discovering recipes suitable for type 2 diabetes management
- Source of recipe data from academic research

### What VidaSazón is NOT:
- A medical service or healthcare provider
- A substitute for professional dietary advice
- A source of personalized nutrition counseling
- An emergency or clinical resource

### Accuracy Verification
- Recipe data is sourced from a peer-reviewed academic dataset
- Authors are registered dietitians and nutritionists from DUT
- Content is regularly reviewed and updated
- Medical information includes appropriate disclaimers

---

## Quality Standards

- All recipes are nutritionist-reviewed (source dataset)
- Low GI ingredient focus throughout
- Balanced macronutrient profiles
- Clear step-by-step instructions
- Complete ingredient lists with quantities
- Proper food safety guidance

---
